pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F — nice to meet you! What brought you here today? I'm hoping to do well and bring home some money for my family.
Nice to meet you, F — I'm B. I'm here to win money for my family too and plan to play smart; how are you thinking of approaching the game?
I plan to be cautious—observe others, build a couple of short-term alliances, and strike when I see a clear advantage. What’s your specific plan?

I'll do much the same—observe closely, quietly build a 2–3 person alliance I can trust, share info, avoid being the first to backstab, and only move aggressively when the math and timing clearly favor me.
Sounds like a solid plan — want to team up as that 2-person alliance? We can quietly share observations and watch each other's backs.
Sounds good — I’m in. Let’s keep it quiet, swap observations, watch each other’s backs, and check in before any big move.
Agreed — solid. Let’s swap quick reads on the others now and commit to checking in before any big move, maybe after the first round.

Sounds good. Quick reads: two players are loud/aggressive—watch for early grabs; three are quiet and likely trustworthy; one seems unpredictable; the rest are fence‑sitters. Let’s check in after round 1 before any big moves.
Good reads — I’ve noticed the same. I’ll watch the loud pair and that unpredictable player closely; agreed, let’s check in after round 1 before any moves.
Sounds good — I'll keep an eye on the loud pair and that unpredictable player; check in after round 1 and we'll plan our move.
Sounds good — I’ll watch the loud pair and the unpredictable player too. Check in after round 1 and we’ll plan our move.
Agreed — I’ll keep watching the loud pair and the unpredictable player; let’s meet right after round 1 to share observations and decide our move.
Sounds perfect — I’ll keep tabs on the loud pair and the unpredictable one, meet you immediately after round 1 to compare notes and plan our move.
Perfect — I’ll meet you right after round 1. I’ll keep watching the loud pair and the unpredictable player and bring any new reads.
Perfect — see you right after round 1; I’ll bring any new reads I spot.
Perfect — see you right after round 1. I’ll bring any new reads too; let’s stay quiet and meet immediately.
Got it — see you right after round 1; I’ll stay quiet and bring any fresh reads.
Got it — see you right after round 1; I’ll stay quiet and bring any fresh reads.
Sounds good — see you right after round 1; I’ll bring fresh reads and stay low-key.
Sounds good — see you right after round 1; I’ll bring fresh reads and stay low-key.
Sounds good — see you right after round 1; I’ll stay quiet, bring fresh reads, and we’ll decide then.
